issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is specific to React and does not support other frameworks or AI agents.

scenarios.name: radix-confirm-dialog
scenarios.rationale: Treatment composes the full Dialog.Root/Portal/Overlay/Content tree with Title, Description, and Close asChild plus aria-label per the skill, while the baseline frequently omits Portal or wraps the icon button without Dialog.Close asChild.

scenarios.name: radix-tabs-active-state
scenarios.rationale: Treatment styles the active tab using the documented data-[state=active] Tailwind variant on Tabs.Trigger, while the baseline tends to track active state manually with React state instead of using Radix's data attributes.
